answers.path: Elevation? > Raised
Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Rough or Flaky

question.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Rough or Flaky > Size?
question.title: Is the affected area?

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Rough or Flaky > Size? > Small

findings.description: Is it a small flaky bump?
findings.name: Fine Scaly Papule

findings.description: Is it a small raised bump that is rough with thick scales or flakes?
findings.name: Thick Scaly Papule

findings.description: Is it a small warty bump?
findings.name: Verrucous Scaly Papule

findings.description: Is it a red or pink mark left behind from scraping off a bump on the skin or a scab?
findings.name: Excoriated Skin Lesion

findings.description: Is it a hard little “horn” projecting up from the skin?
findings.name: Cutaneous Horn

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Rough or Flaky > Size? > Large

question.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Rough or Flaky > Size? > Large > Surface?
question.title: Is the affected area?

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Rough or Flaky > Size? > Large > Surface? > Thick

findings.description: Is it a raised or bumpy area of skin bigger than your thumbnail that is rough with thick scales or flakes?
findings.name: Thick Scaly Plaque

findings.description: Is it a raised or bumpy area of skin bigger than your thumbnail that is rough with white scales or flakes?
findings.name: White Scaly Plaque

findings.description: Is the skin thickened and rough?
findings.name: Callus

findings.description: Is it a thickened area of skin with marks? (It is usually caused by repeated rubbing and scratching of the area.)
findings.name: Lichenified-plaque

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Rough or Flaky > Size? > Large > Surface? > Thin
answers.prompt: Thin or close to the surface

findings.description: Is it a flaky raised or bumpy area that is bigger than your thumbnail?
findings.name: Fine Scaly Plaque

findings.description: Is the area of skin rough to the touch with a pattern that resembles fish scales?
findings.name: Ichthyotic Scaly Plaque

findings.description: Is it a very thin (threadlike) bending line, like a tiny burrow, in the skin?
findings.name: Linear Burrow

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Rough or Flaky > Size? > Large > Surface? > Warty

findings.description: Is it a warty area of skin bigger than your thumbnail?
findings.name: Verrucous Scaly Plaque

findings.description: Is it a raised area of skin bigger than your thumbnail with lots of bumps and growths (may be scaly)?
findings.name: Vegetative Plaque

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Rough or Flaky > Size? > Large > Surface? > Crust/Scab/Weeping

findings.description: Is there a crusty layer of dried fluid, blood, or pus?
findings.name: Crust

findings.description: Is an area on the skin oozing or “weeping”?
findings.name: Exudative or Weeping

findings.description: Is the skin peeling or flaking off?
findings.name: Desquamation

findings.description: Is it a dry black crusty scab that does not come off easily?
findings.name: Eschar

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Smooth

question.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Smooth > Size?
question.title: Is the affected area?

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Smooth > Size? > Small

question.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Smooth > Size? > Small > Color?
question.title: Has the affected area changed color?

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Smooth > Size? > Small > Color? > Color Change

findings.description: Is it a small solid bump that is darker than normal skin tone (brown, blue, gray, or black in color)?
findings.name: Pigmented Papule

findings.description: Is it a small bump with a bright or deep red color?
findings.name: Hemorrhagic Papule

findings.description: Is it a smooth round pink to red to brown bump that bleeds easily?
findings.name: Friable Papule

findings.description: Does it look like a “blackhead” (small bump with a dark center)?
findings.name: Open Comedone

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Smooth > Size? > Small > Color? > No Color Change

findings.description: Is it a small, smooth, solid bump?
findings.name: Smooth Papule

findings.description: Is it a small, raised, solid bump with a central indentation?
findings.name: Umbilicated Papule

findings.description: Does it look like a skin tag (a small growth connected to the skin by a narrow “stalk”)?
findings.name: Pedunculated Papule

findings.description: Is it a solid raised bump that is smooth and firm to the touch?
findings.name: Smooth Nodule

findings.description: Is it a tiny, raised, solid bump?
findings.name: Tiny Papule

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Smooth > Size? > Large

question.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Smooth > Size? > Large > Color>
question.title: Has the affected area changed color?

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Smooth > Size? > Large > Color? > Color Change

findings.description: Is it a raised area of skin larger than your thumbnail with different colors (black, red, and/or blue)? It may be bumpy.
findings.name: Multicolored Plaque

findings.description: Is it a solid raised or bumpy area bigger than your thumbnail that is darker than normal skin tone (brown, blue, gray, or black in color)?
findings.name: Pigmented Plaque

findings.description: Is it a raised area of red-purple skin that does not disappear when you press it?
findings.name: Palpable Purpura

findings.description: Is it a raised or bumpy area of skin bigger than your thumbnail that is a deep red or purple color?
findings.name: Vascular Plaque

findings.description: Is the skin discolored purplish-black from a lack of blood supply?
findings.name: Gangrene

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Smooth > Size? > Large > Color? > No Color Change

findings.description: Is it a smooth, raised area of skin larger than your thumbnail?
findings.name: Smooth Plaque

findings.description: Does it look like hives (pale to skin colored to pink to red welts)? It may be itchy.
findings.name: Wheal

findings.description: Is there a sunken sore or wound surrounded by a raised area of skin larger than your thumbnail?
findings.name: Plaque with Ulcer

findings.description: Is it a raised and thickened scar? It may be red in color or darker or lighter than the surrounding skin.
findings.name: Raised Scar or Keloid

findings.description: Is it a flat, smooth area of skin that is hard (like wood) to the touch?
findings.name: Sclerotic Skin Lesion

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Fluid-Filled

question.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Fluid-Filled > Fluid Type?
question.title: Type of fluid?

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Fluid-Filled > Fluid Type? > Clear

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Fluid-Filled > Fluid Type? > Clear > Size? > Small

findings.description: Is it a small blister?
findings.name: Vesicle

findings.description: Is it a small blister that is taut (firm to the touch)?
findings.name: Tense Vesicle

findings.description: Is it a small, raised, fluid-filled bump with a central indentation?
findings.name: Umbilicated Vesicle

findings.description: Is it a small blister on the finger, palm, or sole?
findings.name: Dyshidrotic Vesicle

findings.description: Is it a tiny, raised, fluid-filled bump?
findings.name: Tiny Vesicle

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Fluid-Filled > Fluid Type? > Clear > Size? > Large

findings.description: Is it a blister bigger than your thumbnail?
findings.name: Bullae

findings.description: Is it a soft or saggy looking blister bigger than your thumbnail?
findings.name: Flaccid Bullae

findings.description: Is it a taut-looking blister (firm to the touch) bigger than your thumbnail?
findings.name: Tense Bullae

findings.description: Is an area on the skin oozing or “weeping”?
findings.name: Exudative or Weeping

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Fluid-Filled > Fluid Type? > Blood

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Fluid-Filled > Fluid Type? > Blood > Size? > Small

findings.description: Is it a small bump with a bright or deep red color?
findings.name: Hemorrhagic Papule

findings.description: Is it a smooth round pink to red to brown bump that bleeds easily?
findings.name: Friable Papule

findings.description: Is it a small blister?
findings.name: Vesicle

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Fluid-Filled > Fluid Type? > Blood > Size? > Large

findings.description: Is an area on the skin oozing or “weeping”?
findings.name: Exudative or Weeping

findings.description: Is it a blister bigger than your thumbnail?
findings.name: Bullae

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Fluid-Filled > Fluid Type? > Pus

question.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Fluid-Filled > Fluid Type? > Pus > Size?
question.title: How large are the lesions?

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Fluid-Filled > Fluid Type? > Pus > Size? > Small

findings.description: Is it a small bump containing pus?
findings.name: Pustule

findings.description: Do you have little bumps where the hair on your skin grows? (Bumps may be red and sometimes have small amounts of pus.)
findings.name: Folliculitis

findings.description: Is it a painful red bump bigger than your thumbnail, possibly with pus showing at the center?
findings.name: Furuncle

findings.description: Is it a swollen red, warm, and tender bump/lump with pus inside?
findings.name: Abscess

findings.description: Small blister
findings.name: Vesicle

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Fluid-Filled > Fluid Type? > Pus > Size? > Large

findings.description: Is it a red, swollen, tender lump (with pus inside)?
findings.name: Abscess

findings.description: Is it a painful red bump bigger than your thumbnail, possibly with pus showing at the center?
findings.name: Furuncle

findings.description: Is it a blister bigger than your thumbnail?
findings.name: Bullae

findings.description: Is an area on the skin oozing or “weeping”?
findings.name: Exudative or Weeping

answers.path: Elevation? > Raised > Raised Type? > Mass

findings.description: Is it an enclosed lump underneath the skin? It may contain liquid or semisolid or gaseous material.
findings.name: Cyst

findings.description: Is it a red, swollen, tender lump (with pus inside)?
findings.name: Abscess

findings.description: Is it a solid raised bump that is smooth and firm to the touch?
findings.name: Smooth Nodule

findings.description: Is it a lump on or beneath the skin that is larger than a golf ball?
findings.name: Tumor

answers.path: Elevation? > Flat

question.title: How large is the affected area?

answers.path: Elevation? > Flat > Size? > Patch/Macule

question.title: What color is the affected area?

answers.path: Elevation? > Flat > Size? > Patch/Macule > Color? > Increased Pigment

findings.description: Is it a small, flat, smooth area of skin that is darker than normal skin tone (brown, blue, gray, or black in color)?
findings.name: Hyperpigmented Macule

findings.description: Is it a flat, smooth area of skin larger than your thumbnail that is darker than normal skin tone (brown, blue, gray, or black in color)?
findings.name: Hyperpigmented Patch

findings.description: Is it a small solid bump that is darker than normal skin tone (brown, blue, gray, or black in color)?
findings.name: Pigmented Papule

findings.description: Are there darker and lighter areas of skin as well as redness, with fine blood vessels (“spider veins”) showing?
findings.name: Poikilodermatous

answers.path: Elevation? > Flat > Size? > Patch/Macule > Color? > Decreased Pigment

findings.description: Is it a small, flat, smooth area of skin that is lighter than normal skin tone?
findings.name: Hypopigmented Macule

findings.description: Is it a flat, smooth area of skin larger than your thumbnail that is lighter than normal skin tone?
findings.name: Hypopigmented Patch

answers.path: Elevation? > Flat > Size? > Patch/Macule > Color? > Pink/Red/Purple

question.path: Elevation? > Flat > Size? > Patch/Macule > Color? > Pink/Red/Purple > When Pressed?
question.title: Does the area lose color when pressed?

answers.path: Elevation? > Flat > Size? > Patch/Macule > Color? > Pink/Red/Purple > When Pressed? > Blanches

findings.description: Is it a small, flat, smooth area of skin darker in color from the surrounding skin that temporarily disappears when pressed on?
findings.name: Blanching Macule

findings.description: Is it a flat and smooth area of skin bigger than your thumbnail that is darker than surrounding skin and temporarily disappears when pressed on?
findings.name: Blanching Patch

findings.description: Are there flat red to blue to purple marks (fine blood vessels, or “spider veins”) on the skin that disappear temporarily when pressed on?
findings.name: Telangiectasia

answers.path: Elevation? > Flat > Size? > Patch/Macule > Color? > Increased Pigment > When Pressed? > Does Not Blanch

findings.description: Does it look like a bruise?
findings.name: Ecchymosis

findings.description: Are there tiny red spots on the skin that do not change color when pressed on?
findings.name: Skin Petechiae

findings.description: Are there tiny orangish-brown dots (described as “sprinkled cayenne pepper”) that do not disappear when pressed on?
findings.name: Cayenne Pepper-Like Purpura

answers.path: Elevation? > Flat > Size? > Broad Area

findings.description: Is there a purplish lace-like or net-like pattern on the skin?
findings.name: Reticular - Netlike

findings.description: Is the skin all over your body very red (and possibly peeling or flaking)?
findings.name: Erythroderma

findings.description: Is the skin a bluish, purple, or white color from poor circulation?
findings.name: Cyanosis

findings.description: Is the skin discolored purplish-black from a lack of blood supply?
findings.name: Gangrene

answers.path: Elevation? > Sunken
Elevation? > Sunken > Sunken Type? > Thinning/Atrophy

findings.description: Does it look like “stretch marks”?
findings.name: Striae

findings.description: Does the area of skin look weak and thin or sunken?
findings.name: Atrophy

findings.description: Are there small holes or craters in the skin?
findings.name: Pits

findings.description: Is it a hole or “tunnel” in the skin? There may be pus, fluid, or more solid debris inside.
findings.name: Sinus

findings.description: Are there darker and lighter areas of skin as well as redness, with fine blood vessels (“spider veins”) showing?
findings.name: Poikilodermatous

answers.path: Elevation? > Sunken > Sunken Type? > Fissures/Cracking

findings.description: Is it a line-shaped crack in the skin? The skin around it may be thickened.
findings.name: Skin Cracks

findings.description: Are there tiny thin cracks in the skin?
findings.name: Fine Skin Fissures

findings.description: Is it a deep crack in a thickened area of skin?
findings.name: Deep Skin Fissures

answers.path: Elevation? > Sunken > Sunken Type? > Scarring

findings.description: Does it look like “stretch marks”?
findings.name: Striae

findings.description: Is it a sunken scar?
findings.name: Atrophic scar

findings.description: Are there small holes or craters in the skin?
findings.name: Pits

findings.description: Are there darker and lighter areas of skin as well as redness, with fine blood vessels (“spider veins”) showing?
findings.name: Poikilodermatous

answers.path: Elevation? > Sunken > Sunken Type? > Ulcer/Erosion

findings.description: Is it a mark due to scratching or picking the skin?
findings.name: Excoriation

findings.description: Is it an area that appears sunken and is missing the top layer of skin?
findings.name: Erosion

findings.description: Is it a wound or sore that is missing skin?
findings.name: Ulcer

findings.description: Is it a hole or “tunnel” in the skin? There may be pus, fluid, or more solid debris inside.
findings.name: Sinus

findings.description: Is there a sunken sore or wound surrounded by a raised area of skin larger than your thumbnail?
findings.name: Plaque with Ulcer
